scripts.test: bun test apps/api/tests apps/web/tests packages/db/tests packages/security/tests packages/config/tests operator/tests singbox-core/tests
scripts.build: bun run --filter '@cool-tunnel/api' build && bun run --filter '@cool-tunnel/web' build && bun run --filter 'ct-operator' build
scripts.api:test: bun test apps/api/tests packages/db/tests packages/security/tests packages/config/tests
